overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing Aloy exploring a vibrant coastal tribal village built on wooden cliffside platforms. The character walks through decorated pathways, pauses at an ocean overlook, and navigates a crowded ceremonial gathering area before engaging in dialogue with a villager.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated wooden walkway through cliffside village

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a wooden pathway through the tribal village, approaching a large fortress structure

notable_agents.action: tribal villager standing by the wall with arms crossed
group of villagers walking ahead on the wooden path

entered.detail: massive multi-level wooden tower structure with colorful decorative elements and rope bridges
tall red triangular flags lining the left side of the walkway
weathered wooden plank pathway with thick rope railings
thick twisted rope handrails along the walkway edge

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Aloy walking along an elevated wooden pathway through a tribal village built on coastal cliffs. Red ceremonial banners line the left side while rope railings edge the right. Several tribal villagers are visible ahead and to the sides as the character approaches a large fortress-like wooden structure in the distance.

events.description: arrives at wooden overlook platform revealing expansive turquoise ocean and white sand beach below

agents.ego_description: stopping at the overlook to gaze at the coastal scenery, panning view across the ocean and beach

entered.detail: vibrant blue-green coastal waters with visible submerged rocks and gentle waves
white sand beach curving along the coastline with scattered vegetation
large rocky outcrops rising from the water near the shore

segments.scene_description: The character reaches a wooden overlook platform and stops to observe the stunning coastal vista. The view reveals turquoise ocean waters, a white sand beach, and rocky outcrops below, with the previous village structures now behind the camera.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper village square with ceremonial gathering hall

events.description: turns away from ocean view and walks back into the main village settlement area
turns right into a larger open plaza area with a central ceremonial building

agents.ego_description: walking back from the overlook and entering the main village square, passing a campfire and approaching a large decorated hall

notable_agents.action: villager tending to a burning campfire near the walkway

entered.detail: large wooden structure with curved roof and colorful painted decorations along the eaves
burning fire pit with smoke rising, surrounded by wooden seating
tall wooden poles with intricate tribal carvings and red-blue patterns

segments.scene_description: Aloy turns away from the ocean and walks back into the village, entering a larger plaza area. A ceremonial longhouse with colorful roof decorations dominates the view ahead, while a campfire burns to the left and decorated totem poles stand to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: circular ceremonial gathering pit with banner decorations

events.description: descends wooden steps into a sunken circular amphitheater-like gathering area filled with villagers

agents.ego_description: walking down into the crowded ceremonial circle, navigating between groups of villagers gathered for an event

notable_agents.action: villager in ceremonial dress walking directly ahead through the crowd
villager standing guard near the colorful banner displays

entered.detail: sunken circular gathering area with tiered wooden seating and plank flooring
dense array of red, blue, and white triangular flags lining the amphitheater walls
steep wooden steps leading up the far side of the gathering pit

segments.scene_description: The character descends into a bustling circular wooden amphitheater filled with tribal villagers. Multicolored ceremonial banners in red, blue, and white create a vibrant perimeter around the sunken gathering area as Aloy navigates through the crowd toward stairs on the far side.

scene_state.functional_zone: ceremonial exit stairs with decorated archway

events.description: stops to engage in dialogue with a nearby villager about recent events
resumes walking and begins ascending wooden stairs toward a decorated stone archway

agents.ego_description: stopping to listen to a villager's dialogue, then proceeding up the stairs through a ceremonial archway

notable_agents.action: villager speaking to Aloy about what happened out there

entered.detail: stone tunnel entrance adorned with colorful tribal banners and wooden spikes
suspension bridge with rope railings spanning overhead between structures

segments.scene_description: Aloy stops at the edge of the gathering pit to speak with a villager who asks about recent events. After the brief dialogue exchange, the character resumes walking and ascends wooden stairs toward a decorated stone archway, passing under a rope bridge while leaving the ceremonial amphitheater behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a cliffside tribal village that transitions from narrow elevated pathways to a wide coastal vista and finally into a bustling ceremonial center. It begins with Aloy walking along a wooden walkway lined with red banners and rope railings, moving toward a distant fortress-like structure. As she reaches a wooden overlook, the perspective shifts to reveal a stunning expanse of turquoise ocean waters and white sand beaches before turning back toward the village interior. The scene then expands into a large plaza featuring a decorated longhouse and burning campfires, leading the character down into a vibrant, sunken amphitheater filled with villagers and multicolored banners. Finally, after a brief dialogue exchange at the edge of the gathering pit, the camera follows Aloy as she ascends wooden stairs and passes under a rope bridge toward a decorated stone archway.
